title: Slovak Leek Soup
description: A hearty and comforting Slovak-inspired soup made with leeks and a variety of vegetables.

ingredients.name: Floral
ingredients.amount: 1 cup, sliced (such as carrots and celery)

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the chopped leeks and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the sliced floral ingredients and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Add the sliced potatoes and vegetable broth to the pot.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 20 minutes.
Use an immersion blender to puree the soup until smooth.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
